title: Visiting Grandma
content: On Sunday afternoon, Noah visited his grandmother in the countryside. Her small house was surrounded by flowers and fruit trees. As soon as he arrived, she hugged him warmly and offered him homemade cookies and tea. They spent hours talking about family memories and looking through old photo albums. Noah helped her water the garden before dinner. When the sun began to set, he prepared to leave. His grandmother gave him extra cookies for the trip home. Noah always felt peaceful and happy after visiting her.
